meaning: n.讨别人开心的人,马屁精
examples: Soon everyone will be walking around, humming holiday tunes and acting jollier than usual.
And with more people ambling over from the toy department, the season could be a little bit jollier in Bentonville this year.
He has presented a jollier image, and people remember that, by local standards, he is cosmopolitan, having spent a couple of years at a school in Switzerland.
